name: Simba Cat Alutray Paté Cat Food – Chicken 100g
shortDescription: Provide your cat with a delicious and nutritious meal with Simba Cat Paté Chicken. This complete wet cat food is made with quality chicken and carefully selected ingredients to deliver balanced nutrition for adult cats.
description: Featuring a smooth and appetizing paté texture, this recipe is easy to eat and highly palatable, making it ideal for everyday feeding. Chicken provides a valuable source of protein to help maintain strong muscles and support your cat’s active lifestyle. Formulated to meet the nutritional needs of adult cats, Simba Cat Paté delivers essential nutrients in every serving while offering the rich taste cats love. Ready to serve and easy to digest, it is a convenient choice for cat owners seeking quality daily nutrition. Key Benefits Complete and balanced wet food for adult cats Made with quality chicken for great taste Source of protein to support muscle maintenance Smooth paté texture for easy chewing and digestion Highly palatable recipe for everyday feeding Suitable for adult cats of all breeds Ready-to-serve meal Convenient 100g portion Ingredients Meat and animal derivatives (including 6% chicken), minerals. Storage Instructions Store in a cool, dry place. Once opened, refrigerate any unused portion and consume within 2 days. Always provide fresh, clean drinking water. Size: 100g
